case_title: FROSS, DANIEL vs. LEIS, GLEN R. et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, DANIEL FROSS SHALL RECEIVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1955 MCALLISTER. THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 6-1-95. RENT AND DAMAGES OF $5,295.00 ARE AWARDED PLAINTIFF ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $750 AND COSTS OF $120 ARE ALSO AWARDED PLAINTIFF. THIS JUDGMENT SHALL BE SET ASIDE IF DEFENDANT MOVES BY 6-1-95. DEFENDANT, GLEN R. LEIS, GAVE THE NAMES OF HIS SUBTENANTS ON THE RECORD. THE SUBTENANTS ARE TODD SNELL AND JOHNNY "MENTAL."
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FROSS, DANIEL
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LEIS, GLEN R.

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT LEIS, GLEN R.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEIS, GLEN R. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1955 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $5,295.00 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,165.00, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FROSS, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEIS, GLEN R. DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
